signals.reasoning: Cover the live SOL short immediately. The fresh short is now about $35.87 underwater after only briefly reaching about $4.39 unrealized profit, retained none of peak P&L, is flagged urgent, still has no stop, and liquidation distance is under 1%, while the new headline flow is explicitly relief-style and anti-short.
BTC continues to show trend-supported upside and is not a clean fresh short while the relief-style headline is active. Under veto it stays watch-only rather than a new long chase.
ETH remains one of the strongest rebound structures on the board, but the move is already well underway and veto keeps it in watch mode.
GRIFFAIN is already deep into a liquidation-style flush and does not look early enough to press fresh as a short.
STABLE has strong negative-funding squeeze fuel, but price is still weak and open interest says fresh shorts are pressing. It is interesting, but not clean enough under veto.
BOME is moving with the relief tape, but the supporting structure is too incomplete to justify action.
POLYX has real squeeze-long support from strongly negative funding, but the move is already in motion and the open-interest support is incomplete. Under veto it stays watch-only.
GRASS also looks like a completed liquidation flush rather than an early fresh short. Better to pass than chase.
LDO remains structurally strong, but it is too extended to chase and too strong to fade casually during a veto window.
TST is still a crowded squeeze continuation and does not offer a clean new edge either way from this point.
